case_title: ADRIANA E MALDONADO VS. JUDITH FONSECA

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FONSECA, JUDITH HEARING SET FOR JAN-19-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
